category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a USB programmer for downloading and uploading firmware to and from USB devices.
source_facts.repo points to the WestberryTech firmware updater project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables lists wb32-dfu-updater_cli as the executable.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official repository, whose README is the available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/WestberryTech/wb32-dfu-updater, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies USB firmware download/upload functionality.
source_facts.executables identifies the command-line updater executable.
